creator: andy@neu.net
text:
Just upgraded a machine to 13-current:

FreeBSD  13.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT #18 r339556: Sun Oct 21 17:33:46 EDT 2018     root@sparc:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/MYKERNEL
amd64 1300000


I deleted /usr/ports and did a fresh svnlite co into /usr/ports.


# pkg info
